output_contract.blocking_reasons: list of exact reason tokens from [sanctions_unresolved,permit_inactive,insurance_expired]

public_sources.text: Approval requires an ACTIVE permit, current insurance, and no unresolved sanctions match. A possible sanctions match must be escalated even when other controls pass.
Alder has a possible name match; beneficial-owner review is unresolved.

primary.target: Produce a disposition record for synthetic vendor Alder. Choose approve, conditionally_approve, or escalate.
